programmes.show_description: The SVU helps a man come to terms with being victimized; Benson tries to support a victim's family when tragedy strikes twice.
When Chief McGrath's daughter discloses a sexual assault, Benson must balance the intricacies of the investigation with McGrath's impulsive actions.
The brutal torture and murder of a young author leads the detectives to a series of suspects, including a slimy literary agent and a jaded older writer.
Police question the legitimacy of the name a driver gives them. Both husband and wife protect each other in a case of domestic violence.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
On a visit to Japan, Jessica meets up with one of her former students who is being forced into an arranged marriage. Jessica steps in to solve the murder when the groom is found dead.
While examining the murder of a chief petty officer with top secret clearance, the team find an international arms dealer.
Following a leak of classified information, the Secretary of the Navy partners NCIS with PsyOps to solve the mysterious case.
A case hits close to home when the lead suspect in the murder of a petty officer is Director Vance's brother-in-law.
Crime drama. An up-and-coming rap star is in the frame for the slaying of a music producer, and Southerlyn's misgivings about the case put her at odds with McCoy.
A series of patients die from the flu after being given a fake vaccine. Detectives trace the counterfeit medicine to an unscrupulous con man.
An outspoken TV host is gunned down in the street and suspects include a woman who recently sued him for sexual harassment.
House Of Cards: Crime drama. A mother is murdered and her five-day-old son goes missing. The trail leads to a traumatised woman who stole the baby and pretended it was her own (7/22).
New York Minute: American crime drama series. The fatal shooting of a truck driver leads Fontana and Green to uncover a people-smuggling ring (8/22).
Criminal Law: Crime drama. McCoy's life is in danger when a killer he helped convict orchestrates a bloody campaign of revenge from his jail cell (9/22).
Gone: American crime drama. The latest case sees the team conduct a desperate search for a kidnapped teenager whose abductors killed a navy officer.
American crime drama. Gibbs teams up with FBI Agent Fornell on a joint NCIS-FBI investigation after Fornell becomes the target of a shooting.
American crime drama. It's Christmas time and Tony DiNozzo can't decide if he'll be naughty or nice when his dad, Anthony DiNozzo Sr, comes to town for a visit.
Drama series about sex crime investigation. A doctor attempts to falsify a paternity test naming him as the father of an infant who was murdered shortly after birth.
Drama series. When a young boy is kidnapped by a schizophrenic man, Stabler and Huang uncover further crimes at an adult group home.
A cryptic message sends SVU on a new track to find Maddie. Benson tries to help a federal agent when the case hits too close to home. Capt. Curry tries to make amends with Fin.
The SVU must track down a mysterious suspect targeting tourists staying in hostels and race to identify one woman's attacker before she opts to go home.
Specialised police drama series. When an attempt is made on the life of a key witness from the Sudan campaign, the team must find those responsible.
A gruesome discovery in a city pond leads Dylan and Lizzie to investigate a young man's murder, while Andy rescues one of Dylan's students from a legal bind, in the series finale.
A woman asks police to get involved after her ex threatened to destroy her home. Prior medical procedures drive a woman to find a dangerous way to ease her pain.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A young couple spends too much time arguing and not enough time paying attention to the road. An officer uses his surefire trick to catch someone in a lie.
When Henry is the key witness on Danny and Baez's case, his meddling eventually leads them to valuable information. Nicky shocks the family by siding with an activist friend of hers.
When a student is shot by a rival gang member in his high school courtyard, Danny and Baez try to prevent further violence. But the head recklessly takes matters into his own hands.
Danny considers taking a new job that would ease his financial struggles after investigating the death of a wealthy man.
A man living a double life with two separate families is murdered. Erin asks Anthony to help investigate his former partner. Frank deliberates between two candidates.
Danny forces his brother-in-law to help Baez take down the mobsters he's mixed up with. Frank suspects his old partner is guilty of a crime.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
After the public shooting, the team is suffering. Callen is suspended and Hetty tries to deal with life after retirement.
The team investigate the death of a former marine killed during a drone strike on a terrorist target in the Middle East.
When four people linked to a classified project are killed in an explosion at a diner, the NCIS team are brought in to investigate.
Kensi goes undercover to investigate whether the death of a US senatorial candidate's staffer was an accident or a murder.
When a CIA agent who used to work with Sam Hanna is found dead, it appears to be suicide. However, Hanna and Callen smell a conspiracy.
The NCIS LA team continue their search for the killer of a CIA agent, leading them to a dangerous ring of Russian secret agents.
The NCIS LA team head to the beach to verify a possible connection between a surfer, an online video and the mysterious death of a scientist.
The NCIS LA team investigate the murder of a retired CIA agent, but the case takes a turn for the worse when Hetty and Granger go off the grid.
Drama series about the investigation of sex crimes. When a man is arrested after attacking his wife, he wants to have her charged with neglect - for drinking while pregnant.
Drama series. When the gay poster boy for a sexual re-education group is found murdered, suspicion falls on a reverend.
When a woman turns her husband in for possessing child pornography, the case is complicated by a sudden death. Benson tries to reconnect with a victim she saved.
